title: ramium
intro: Ranium, also known as Sida rhombifolia, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Ramium include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ramium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
